Itemized  ·  Hospitals  ·  USC Arcadia Hospital

USC Arcadia Hospital
prices.

📍 Arcadia, CA Keck Medicine of USC 3/5 CMS rating

Cash-pay and insurance prices for 34 procedures at USC Arcadia Hospital, pulled from the federally-mandated machine-readable file the hospital is required to publish. Cash-pay range across these procedures: $24 to $23,248.

Procedure prices.

  • Inguinal hernia repair, open CPT 49505 $7,474

Compare USC Arcadia Hospital to peers.

See how each procedure here stacks up against other hospitals in Arcadia and nationally. Pick your insurance, see your specific rate.

Open the comparison →

CMS quality rating.

3/5 stars on CMS Hospital Care Compare. Based on ~50 measures of safety, mortality, readmission, patient experience, and timeliness. View on Care Compare ↗

About this data.

The prices above are pulled directly from USC Arcadia Hospital's machine-readable file (MRF), required under the Hospital Price Transparency Rule (45 CFR 180.50). We download the file, parse the rows for our shoppable CPT set, and publish the dollar amounts as the hospital published them. No surveys, no estimates.

Cash-pay rates are what an uninsured patient would be charged. Insurance-negotiated rates vary by payer and plan; pick a payer in the comparison tool to see plan-specific numbers.

Data sources: CMS Hospital Price Transparency rule (45 CFR 180.50). CMS Hospital Care Compare (xubh-q36u). Last refresh: 2026-04-27.
A consumer reading of CMS-mandated MRF data. Not medical or financial advice. Itemized · itemized.health
